assumptions: Work knots carry hierarchy and dependencies; the execution_plan knot carries plan provenance and wave structure.
Slice 3 reuses the six existing April 13 knots instead of recreating them.
execution_plan.objective: Ship the Grooming to Execution Plan spec
execution_plan.summary: Three-slice execution plan: persist and expose plans, let agents drive plans, improve generation quality.

waves.name: Persist and expose execution plans
waves.objective: Land execution-plan storage, APIs, and coverage.

steps.notes: Execution plan storage and types — persist execution plans as typed data.
Execution plan read/write API — expose create/get/list plan routes.
Persisted plan coverage — cover persistence and readback behavior.

waves.name: Let external agents drive execution plans

steps.notes: Next-step selection — choose the next executable plan step.
Step-driving routes — start, complete, and fail plan steps.
Plan-driving coverage — verify end-to-end plan driving flows.

waves.name: Improve execution plan generation quality
waves.objective: Improve planner selection, prompt context, and step protocol.

steps.notes: Planner selection and prompt foundations — land the first planner and prompt prerequisites.
Step protocol follow-through — complete planner follow-up and prompt step protocol work.
Plan quality cleanup — finish the final quality and cleanup pass.

data.title: Ship local execution-plan API and driver
